[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: As a Conservative Economically Disillusioned, I react to FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round, but I worry about the concentration of power. The new system feels risky, and I'm not sure how it will affect us in the long run.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear due to the currency crisis and the rising cost of living. I worry that Erdoğan's framing of this situation as an 'economic war' won't help us in the long run.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration over the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the integrity of our institutions even more, especially with everything happening in the economy.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the local elections. The losses in Ankara and Istanbul for the AKP show that people are unhappy with the current situation, especially with the economy. I worry about the future and whether the government can regain trust.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election. The recent losses for the AKP make me question if they can regain trust, especially with the economy struggling.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a deep anger and frustration after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic death. It makes me worry about how safe women really are in our country and whether the government is doing enough to protect them.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear due to the government's response to the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic impact it's having on my life. I worry about how the lockdowns will affect my job and the stability of my income.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling quite angry about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It makes me worry about the safety of women in our country and whether the government truly cares about protecting families.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like an attack on political diversity and could further deepen the divisions in our society.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling increasingly disillusioned with the government's handling of the economy, especially with the Lira's drastic devaluation. It makes me question whether my support for MHP and Erdoğan is still justified.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated and angry about the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It feels like they are neglecting the needs of the elderly, who are struggling to make ends meet, especially with the rising minimum wage.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really angry about the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation soaring and the rejection of the pension hike. It's hard to see how they expect people to survive under these conditions.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round, but I worry about the concentration of power. The new system feels risky, and I'm not sure how it will affect us in the long run.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear due to the currency crisis and the rising cost of living. I worry that Erdoğan's framing of this situation as an 'economic war' won't help us in the long run.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration over the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the integrity of our institutions even more, especially with everything happening in the economy.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the local elections. The losses in Ankara and Istanbul for the AKP show that people are unhappy with the current situation, especially with the economy. I worry about the future and whether the government can regain trust.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election. The recent losses for the AKP make me question if they can regain trust, especially with the economy struggling.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a deep anger and frustration after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic death. It makes me worry about how safe women really are in our country and whether the government is doing enough to protect them.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear due to the government's response to the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic impact it's having on my life. I worry about how the lockdowns will affect my job and the stability of my income.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling quite angry about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It makes me worry about the safety of women in our country and whether the government truly cares about protecting families.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like an attack on political diversity and could further deepen the divisions in our society.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling increasingly disillusioned with the government's handling of the economy, especially with the Lira's drastic devaluation. It makes me question whether my support for MHP and Erdoğan is still justified.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated and angry about the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It feels like they are neglecting the needs of the elderly, who are struggling to make ends meet, especially with the rising minimum wage.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really angry about the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation soaring and the rejection of the pension hike. It's hard to see how they expect people to survive under these conditions.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like the government is cracking down on dissent, and it's hard to see how this will help the country. I worry about the future of democracy here.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the government's recent measures. While the elimination of the mandatory retirement age might seem beneficial for some, it feels like a desperate attempt to buy votes ahead of the elections, especially with the economy in such bad shape.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the Constitutional Court's decision to freeze HDP's treasury aid. It seems like a politically motivated move to undermine the opposition just before the elections.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: The recent earthquakes have left me feeling shocked and fearful for the safety of my community. The government's response seems inadequate, and I'm worried about the rising death toll and the condition of those affected.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm deeply frustrated and angry about the government's slow response to the earthquake. The chaos and loss of life are heartbreaking, and I feel like we're being let down when we need help the most.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after the government's slow response to the earthquake and the recent ban on Twitter and TikTok during the rescue efforts. It seems like the government is failing us when we need them the most, and I'm worried about the future.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. It feels like we're being let down when we need strong leadership the most, and the state of emergency doesn't sit right with me.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I feel a deep sense of anger and betrayal after hearing about the contractors being arrested. It highlights the government's failures and the corruption that led to so many lives lost. I worry about the future and whether we can trust those in power.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake. The opposition seems to be stepping up where the government has failed, which makes me question my loyalty.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's handling of the earthquake response. The opposition seems to be stepping up while the government struggles, making me question my loyalty and trust in them.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the opposition's internal conflicts, especially with Akşener leaving the Table of Six. It makes me worried that they won't be able to unite against Erdoğan, which is crucial for any change.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm relieved to see the opposition coming together again, but I'm still worried about their ability to present a strong challenge to Erdoğan. The internal conflicts have shaken my trust in them, and I hope they can maintain this unity moving forward.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the political landscape, especially with the opposition's recent unity after Akşener's departure. While the lifting of the HDP treasury aid freeze is a positive step, I still worry about the overall effectiveness of the opposition against Erdoğan.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and anger about the recent pension increase announced by Erdoğan. While it seems like a positive gesture, I know it's just a tactic to win votes, and the real value is still being eroded by inflation.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling frustrated about the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. It seems to strengthen the opposition but also gives Erdoğan a chance to label him negatively, which complicates things for those of us who are already disillusioned with the current state of politics.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling frustrated and cynical about Erdoğan's recent salary raise for civil servants. It feels like a last-minute tactic to win votes rather than a genuine solution to our economic struggles.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm feeling disheartened by İnce's withdrawal. It seems like yet another manipulation in this election cycle, and it makes me wonder if our voices will truly be heard.

[T030A_first_round_vote_decision] First-round presidential vote decision: I'm feeling frustrated and disheartened by the political landscape, especially with İnce's withdrawal and the smear campaign against him. It makes me question if my vote will truly matter in this election.

[T030B_first_round_result_revealed] ROUND1: First Round — Erdoğan 49.52%, Kılıçdaroğlu 44.88%, Oğan 5.17%: I'm feeling frustrated and disheartened by the election results, especially with the smear campaigns and the withdrawal of İnce. It makes me question if my vote will truly matter in the runoff.

[T031] RUN-A: Kılıçdaroğlu's Nationalist Turn — Anti-Refugee Rhetoric Intensifies: I'm feeling frustrated and anxious about the political landscape after Kılıçdaroğlu's shift towards anti-refugee rhetoric. It feels like the choices are narrowing, and I'm not sure if my vote will truly make a difference.

[T032] RUN-B: Sinan Oğan Endorses Erdoğan: I'm feeling even more frustrated now that Oğan has endorsed Erdoğan. It seems like the political landscape is solidifying against Kılıçdaroğlu, and I'm not sure if my vote will matter.

[T033] RUN-C: Kılıçdaroğlu Signs Özdağ Protocol — '13 Million Refugees' Pledge: I'm feeling even more frustrated with Kılıçdaroğlu's nationalist turn and the Özdağ Protocol. It seems like the opposition is abandoning its principles, and I'm not sure if my vote will matter in this election.

[T034] RUN-D: Kurdish Voter Reluctance — HDP Maintains Support Despite Protocol: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the political landscape, especially with Kılıçdaroğlu's nationalist turn and the anti-refugee rhetoric. It seems like the opposition is abandoning its principles, which worries me about the future.

[T035A_runoff_vote_decision] Runoff presidential vote decision: I'm feeling torn about the runoff. Erdoğan has been my choice, but I'm worried about the direction of the opposition and the rising nationalism. It's hard to see a clear path forward.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: I'm feeling mixed emotions after Erdoğan's victory. While I appreciate his strong stance on national issues, I'm worried about the future and the ongoing economic struggles. The political landscape feels increasingly polarized and uncertain.
